mask_photo.name: Mask Evidence Photo
mask_photo.description: The Steel Samurai mask the victim was wearing at the time of the incident. The eyebrow area is slightly dented. There is no other damage. The topknot is also intact.

Floor4_Start.text: {center}{color:lime}{blip:3}September 17{nl}Joypolis, Event Hall 4th Floor

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {color:white}{hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["Sad"]}{hideCharacter}{p:500}{fadeInCharacter}{showTextbox}{blip:1}{sprite:Gumshoe["Sad"]}{startBGM:investigation}Maggey is a poor kid, pal.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {sprite:Gumshoe["LookingAway"]}They say if a dog walks, it gets hit by a stick...

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: And when Maggey walks around, she gets swept up in trouble, like nothing but unfair things ever happen to her...

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {sprite:Gumshoe["Angry"]}{playSound:shake}{shake:500}I'm sure this time is some kind of mistake, too!{nl}There's no way she could've killed anyone!

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:1}{sprite:Gumshoe["Sad"]}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead2"]}I hear you.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{showTextbox}{flash}{playSound:cling}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{stopBGM:true}...Oh, right.{nl}There's something I wanted to tell you, just between us.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{showTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}This is top secret.{nl}You can't tell anybody.

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: What is it?

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: The victim, Ms. Nakaki...{nl}She was a suit actress, right?

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: Truth is... back in the day...{nl}{sprite:Gumshoe["Determined"]}{playSound:shake}{flash}{shake:500}I also wanted to be a suit actor!{p:400}

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:0}{playSound:shake}{flash}{shake:200}{color:lightblue}(...I-I really don't care!)

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {color:white}{blip:1}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}{startBGM:investigation}T-That's it?

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {hideTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["ScratchingHead"]}{showTextbox}{sprite:Gumshoe["Thinking"]}Anyway, {nl} Take a look at this.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: It's the Steel Samurai mask the victim,{nl}Ms. Nakaki, was wearing at the time of the incident.

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:1}I get that, but...{nl}what's your point?

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: The eyebrow area is dented a little,{nl}but other than that, not a single scratch.

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}(Only the eyebrow area is dented...)
{addEvidence:mask_photo,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{blip:0}{color:lightblue}Data for "Mask Evidence Photo" added to the Court Record.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {color:white}{blip:1}{sprite:Gumshoe["Normal"]}I can tell because I wanted to be a suit actor myself.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {sprite:Gumshoe["Angry"]}{playSound:shake}{flash}{shake:500}The topknot is the Steel Samurai's lifeline.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: So she must've...{playSound:shake}{flash}{shake:500}{nl}even while falling, protected the topknot with her life.

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}{playSound:shake}{flash}{shake:500}(No... I don't think that's right.)

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: {color:white}{blip:1}There's no way Maggey would kill{nl}someone that admirable.

Floor4_Start.name: Gumshoe
Floor4_Start.text: No, no matter who it is,{nl}there's no way Maggey would ever commit murder!

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: On that, we agree. I swear,{nl}I'll prove her innocence.

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}(All right. I think that's everything here.)

Floor4_Start.name: Phoenix
Floor4_Start.text: {color:lightblue}(Once I've got all the information, I'll head to court.{nl}That's where I'll make everything clear!){color:white}{setState:floor4_done,true}{stopBGM:true}{sectionEnd}

Floor4_evidence_default.name: Phoenix
Floor4_evidence_default.text: {blip:0}{color:lightblue}(He doesn't seem to have any idea.){sectionEnd}
